meta.exportedFrom: Live workflow ID NFJp7ok1KAJiATza on https://n8n.qinclaes.dev
meta.notes: Re-import via n8n UI: Workflows -> Import from File. After import, set the executeWorkflow target (Trigger AI enrichment node) to your local AI-enrichment workflow ID, and set env vars BENEFITS_EMAIL, BENEFITS_PASSWORD, N8N_API_KEY. The Data Table ID 'AszlR72OLpvemUAf' is hardcoded in the upsert node and must be updated to your local partners-table ID.
